content.en:
In front of the black giant pillar.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend and improve his ultimate rules.

As time passed, his Darkest Ultimate Rule was rapidly improving, and it worked well.

Time flies, and tens of billions of domain yuan years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian comprehended the ultimate rules of darkness to the realm of seventy-two, and he was already about to catch up with the ultimate rules of eternal night.

His Eternal Night Ultimate Rule had now been raised to the eighty-one realm.

The Ultimate Darkness Rule was raised to the seventy-two realm, and Ye Tian's strength naturally increased a little, but it had not yet skyrocketed.

However, the strength of his ultimate creature replicating body is extremely powerful, at least in the future, it will be easier to find treasures in the ultimate dark domain.

And Ye Tian also began to study the ultimate body path.

With the help of this black giant "820" pillar, he continued to study and comprehend, which contained traces of the darkest ultimate body, and he couldn't comprehend a trace of it in the past, but now his darkest ultimate rule has reached the seventy-two realm, and he has the qualifications to study.

However, the path of the Darkest Ultimate Body was too difficult to study, and he had been studying it for a long time, but nothing was too good.

"You still have to use foreign objects!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And the general deduction type ultimate weapons are not very effective for him, unless he can obtain the ultimate treasure level deduction type weapons.

But that kind of treasure will be snatched by the Heavenly Extremity, how can it be traded to him?

Unless it is a fragment with extremely side effects, there is no hope of trading.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian began to inquire about such an ultimate treasure.

There were quite a few Ultimate Realm Masters here in the Ultimate Dark Domain, and after he made friends with them a little, and then asked around, he had a clue.

......

The ultimate dark domain.

The palace of the dragon figure is extremely respectful.

Ye Tian came to visit him.

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, I don't know what's going on?"

Long Tu Jizun asked.

In fact, he already roughly knew Ye Tian's purpose, because Ye Tian was inquiring about the ultimate treasure that could be deduced during this time, and he happened to have it, and there was a high probability that he came to trade with him.

"Longtu Jizun, I want to trade the fragment of the Mishu Disk in your hand. "

Ye Tian directly expressed his intentions.

Longtu Jizun said lightly: "Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, Mi Shu Pan is the ultimate treasure, and its value is difficult to estimate......"

Ye Tian knew that Long Tu Jizun wanted the lion to open his mouth and didn't want to sell it cheaply, but the meaning in his words was definitely to sell it.

So, Ye Tian said: "Longtu Jizun, the Mishu Plate is indeed very precious, but the Mishu Disk fragments are not of much value, as far as I know, the use of the Mishu Disk fragments has to specifically comprehend the Sumeru Ultimate Rules of the Sumeru Ultimate System, so that it can be urged, and it has to pay a great price, and the sequelae are very large, so that its value is much lower." "

Long Tu Jizun said unhurriedly: "It is true that the side effects are very large, but it is a fragment of the ultimate treasure, if you can afford the price, I will sell you, if you can't afford it, I would rather keep it for myself." "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took out some resources obtained from the Ultimate Dark Domain.

"Are these resources sufficient?"

Ye Tian said.

Long Tu Jizun took a look at it, and was a little surprised that Ye Tian's wealth was really a lot.

However, he still shook his head, "It's still not enough, you seem to have a lot of resources, but you lack precious resources." "

Thereupon.

Ye Tian took out some black liquid from the Ultimate Dark Domain again, and now he knew the name of this black liquid.

Dark Liquid!

"Coupled with these Darkest Treasures, if you don't want to, then this deal will be over!" Ye Tian said.

"There is also the Darkest Treasure, your luck is really good, if it were me, I wouldn't dare to enter the Ultimate Dark Realm to find the Darkest Liquid!"

After that, Ye Tian gave all these resources to the Longtu Jizun, and the Longtu Jizun also gave Ye Tian the fragments of the Mishu Disk.

After Ye Tian left, Long Tu Jizun smiled and said, "This Ten Thousand Law Jizun is also strange, with so many treasures in exchange for a spicy chicken's Mishu plate fragment, could it be that he still dares to use it?"

He didn't think too much about it, put away these resources, and then went to cultivate.

......

"The fragments of the Mishu Disk are in hand, the entire sea of dimensions, there are not many ultimate treasures, and there are still the ultimate treasures that can be deduced, at present, I only know this, it has too much effect on me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But if you want to urge the fragments of the Mishu Disk, you have to cultivate the Sumeru Ultimate System......

The Sumeru Ultimate System comes from the Sumeru Star, which belongs to the same grade as the Abyssal Star.

But there is something special about Sumeru, if you get close to it, you can easily be transformed by it.

At present, there are a large number of nine-star peaks that have been crossed to guard Sumeru, and the nine-star peaks must not dare to go over to visit Sumeru Star.

But Ye Tian was not afraid of those Nine Realms peaks that had been crossed.

So, he immediately sent a replica body to Sumeru.

......

Star Meru.

Ye Tian came here and saw countless golden rays, this was not a normal golden light, it was somewhat similar to the Buddha light of the multidimensional realm.

Golden Buddha light!

Ye Tian ignored these and began to study the Sumeru Ultimate System.

At this moment, one after another figures came out of the Buddha's light, and they were golden figures, which were the peaks of the Nine Realms that had been crossed.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian waved his hand and directly killed a Duhua puppet that was at the peak of the Nine Realms.

After that, there were no more puppets to interfere with him.

Time flies.

After a long time, Ye Tian had already researched the Sumeru Ultimate System, and then began to cultivate it, and created the Ultimate Dimensional Killing Move of the Sumeru Ultimate System.

After that, he continued to practice and comprehended the ultimate rules of Sumeru.

this day. 4.5

He has successfully comprehended the ultimate rules of Sumeru!

After that, with the help of the Pearl of Eternal Night, he comprehended the ultimate rules of Sumeru to the ninefold realm in a short period of time.

However, he couldn't continue to break through the Sumeru Ultimate Rule, because the Ultimate Realm Master of this Ultimate System had already been occupied.

Of course, he didn't care.

All he needed to do was urge the Pivot Disk Fragment.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian began to urge the fragments of the Mishu Disk to deduce, first try the effect of comprehending the ultimate rule of the dark, and with the black giant pillar, the effect is very good.

"Good, it's worth the deal!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he also found a problem, the side effects of the Mishu Disk Fragment are indeed very large, and there is a serious problem with his body.
